product: Genie filter editing and audit log enhancements
tagline: Editable filters in Genie: Users can now edit filter values to refine responses.
what_it_does: Editable filters in Genie: Users can now edit filter values to refine responses. For string columns that have entity matching (previously value dictionaries) enabled, Genie uses context to determine when editable filters could improve accuracy and offers them accordingly. New audit log field for Genie comments: A new comment type field is available in the audit log response for the createConversationMessageComment action.
why_it_matters: For string columns that have entity matching (previously value dictionaries) enabled, Genie uses context to determine when editable filters could improve accuracy and offers them accordingly.
